children.label: eq:sum-pow-4
children.html: ∑i=1ni4=n(n+1)(2n+1)(3n2+3n−1)30.\sum_{i=1}^n i^4 = \frac{n(n+1)(2n+1)(3n^2 + 3n - 1)}{30} \enspace.i=1∑n​i4=30n(n+1)(2n+1)(3n2+3n−1)​.
